top_signals.title: Strait of Hormuz reopening may take weeks to ease shipping backlog and oil pressure
top_signals.summary: The Strait of Hormuz is set to reopen after Iran and the U.S. sign a peace deal, but experts warn backlogs and security checks could delay normal shipping.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Stocks Climb as US-Iran Deal Spurs Oil Retreat: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Wall Street staged a comeback that saw stocks climbing as oil fell after a peace deal between the US and Iran spurred optimism that a revival of the Strait of Hormuz will ease inflation risks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Aldi takes the fight to Walmart and Costco
top_signals.summary: After 50 years of slow US expansion the German discount grocer is upping the pace. Can it win over hard-pressed consumers?
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Big Tech Stock Buybacks Vanish as AI Spending Spree Eats Up Cash
top_signals.summary: The artificial-intelligence race is becoming so expensive that it’s snuffing out one of the key forces that has helped keep Big Tech stocks soaring for years: steady share buybacks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
